playwright_config.note: Setup: For bugs #3, #7, #8, Playwright must click the corresponding Tab button in the Sidebar to reveal the component before capturing.

bugs.report_text: The main content container appears to be layered behind other page elements, causing content visibility issues.
The sidebar and main content are displaying in the wrong order, with the sidebar appearing below the main content instead of beside it.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="bg-white shadow-2xl rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col lg:flex-row min-h-screen">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="bg-white shadow-2xl rounded-2xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col-reverse lg:flex-row min-h-screen">

bugs.report_text: The plan features section is displaying as a single column instead of wrapping into multiple columns on larger screens.
The user avatar symbol appears white and invisible on a white background instead of displaying with the intended gradient colors.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-400 to-purple-500 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-5xl shadow-lg">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-5xl shadow-lg text-white">

bugs.report_text: The email input field text appears faded and barely visible in its default state.
bugs.neg_code: className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent transition"
bugs.pos_code: className="w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent transition text-gray-400"

bugs.report_text: The account settings heading text is not applying the intended large font size and appears in regular size.
The push notification settings card is positioned absolutely and overlaps other content instead of flowing naturally in the page.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-purple-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-purple-200">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex items-center justify-between bg-purple-50 p-4 rounded-lg border border-purple-200 absolute">

bugs.report_text: The active sessions items have excessive side padding, causing the content to be compressed into a narrow strip.
bugs.neg_code: <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition">
bugs.pos_code: <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-40 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-50 transition">

bugs.report_text: The sidebar is not displaying at the correct width and appears to collapse or misalign.
bugs.neg_code: <aside className="w-full lg:w-72 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-slate-100 border-r border-gray-200 p-6">
bugs.pos_code: <aside className="w-fll lg:w-72 bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-slate-100 border-r border-gray-200 p-6">

bugs.report_text: The sidebar buttons have excessive negative spacing causing them to overlap and extend beyond the sidebar boundaries.
bugs.neg_code: className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 flex items-center space-x-3 ${
bugs.pos_code: className={`w-full text-left px-4 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 flex items-center space-x-3 -m-8 ${
